# sentry_all_organization_repositories (Data Source)

Retrieve all organization repositories. See the [Sentry documentation](https://docs.sentry.io/api/organizations/list-an-organizations-repositories/) for more information.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization` (String) The organization the resource belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `repositories` (Attributes Set) The list of repositories. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--repositories))

<a id="nestedatt--repositories"></a>
### Nested Schema for `repositories`

Read-Only:

- `date_created` (String) The repository creation timestamp.
- `external_id` (String) The external repository ID.
- `id` (String) The ID of the repository.
- `identifier` (String) The repository identifier used by the integration.
- `import_id` (String) Convenience import ID for `sentry_organization_repository` (`organization/integration_type/integration_id/id`).
- `integration_id` (String) The integration ID backing this repository.
- `integration_type` (String) The integration type (for example: `github`).
- `name` (String) The repository name.
- `provider_id` (String) The provider ID, such as `integrations:github`.
- `provider_name` (String) The provider display name.
- `status` (String) The repository status.
- `url` (String) The repository URL.
